series_metadata.series_description: Intermediate e-mail documents have more significant administrative, legal, and/or fiscal value but do not contain information that influences agency policy. Records may include: General/Routine Correspondence (letters, memo, referral letters, request for routine information answered by standard form letters), status reports for on-going projects and issues; and, any additional e-mail with similar content.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one (1) calendar year. If email becomes part of an official file (i.e. consumer file) as a result of special circumstances, e-mail will be filed and maintained according file they become part of. ; Electronic: one (1) calendar year. If email becomes part of an official file (i.e. consumer file) as a result of special circumstances, e-mail will be filed and maintained according file they become part of
